mentions.note: Crypto derivatives speculation evaporating; part of 'Year of Magical Thinking' playbook Cramer warned about; era ending as capital rotates to real earners.
Crypto crash pressures; if major cryptocurrencies everywhere, less differentiation; don't want to touch; Robin Hood is crypto proxy.
Major cryptos everywhere; less differentiation/value; proxy play for uncertain Bitcoin; don't touch.
Bitcoin proxy soared on positive sentiment from Iran war deescalation. Rallies correlate with risk-on conditions, not fundamental news; pure sentiment trade.
